name: How is fault decided in a work machine accident?

mainEntity.name: How is fault decided in a work machine accident?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers comp is no-fault; benefits regardless of blame if work-related.** Third-party claims use negligence; Idaho comparative fault reduces if you're over 50% at fault[2]. **Key factors:** Employer safety violations irrelevant for comp. **Practical guidance:** Focus on injury proof, not blame. Attorney assesses third-party angles.
